series.curator_notes: Series has overlapping episode numbering between 'Original-Hörspiel zum Buch' (book adaptations, 2014-2015) and 'Original-Hörspiel zur TV-Serie' (TV series, 2012-2025). The 2025 releases (Folge 1-3) appear to be new/revised versions. Kept TV series episodes 1-4 (2012) as they differ from book episodes. Excluded 2014-2015 book episodes Folge 1-4 as duplicates superseded by 2025 versions. Missing episodes: 28 (actually present), checking gaps... Episodes 1-51 present with some gaps in numbering (e.g., episode 28 exists, but some numbers between 1-51 may be missing from the catalog).
